zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Peyton於1417年2月14日出生在英國坎布利其爾德利 德雷頓時，他的父親John de Peyton25歲，母親Grace Burgoyne25歲。他於大約1441年與Margaret Francis在英國坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1443年被列為high sheriff of cambridgeshire & huntingdon。他去世於1484年7月30日在英國素福爾可享年67歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Peyton于1417年2月14日出生在英国坎布利其爾德利 德雷頓时，他的父亲John de Peyton25岁，母亲Grace Burgoyne25岁。他于大约1441年与Margaret Francis在英国坎布利其爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1443年被列为high sheriff of cambridgeshire & huntingdon。他去世于1484年7月30日在英国素福爾可享年67岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Peyton was born on 14 February 1417, in Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, John de Peyton, was 25 and his mother, Grace Burgoyne, was 25. He married Margaret Francis about 1441, in Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1443, at the age of 26, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of cambridgeshire & huntingdon. He died on 30 July 1484, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Peyton est né le 14 février 1417, à Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Peyton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Grace Burgoyne, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Francis environ 1441, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1443, à l’âge de 26 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of cambridgeshire & huntingdon. Il est décédé le 30 juillet 1484, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Peyton am 14. Februar 1417 in Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Peyton 25 und seine Mutter Grace Burgoyne 25. Er hat um 1441 in Cambridgeshire, England Margaret Francis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1443, als er 26 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of cambridgeshire & huntingdon aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. Juli 1484 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Suffolk, England und wurde in Ipswich, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Peyton è nato il il 14 febbraio 1417 nel Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, John de Peyton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Grace Burgoyne, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Francis circa 1441, nel Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1443, all'età di 26 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of cambridgeshire & huntingdon. Morì il 30 luglio 1484, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Peytonが1417年2月14日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアドリー ドレイトンで生まれた時，父John de Peytonは25歳，母Grace Burgoyneは25歳であった。約1441年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアでMargaret Francisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1443年，26歳の時，職業はhigh sheriff of cambridgeshire & huntingdonと記録されている。彼は1484年7月30日にイギリススフォルクで67歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Peyton(이)가 1417년 2월 14일 영국 캄브리지실르 드리 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Peyton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Burgoyne(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1441년 영국 캄브리지실르에서 Margaret Francis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1443년, 26세의 나이로 그의 직업은 high sheriff of cambridgeshire & huntingdon이었다. 그는 1484년 7월 30일 영국 수폴크에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Peyton nasceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1417, em Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Peyton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Grace Burgoyne, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Francis aproximadamente 1441, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1443, com 26 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of cambridgeshire & huntingdon. Ele faleceu em 30 de julho de 1484, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Peyton родился 14 февраля 1417 г. в местности дри дреитон, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Peyton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Burgoyne, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Francis около 1441 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1443 году, в возрасте 26 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of cambridgeshire & huntingdon. Он умер 30 июля 1484 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия.

es.14 February 1417–30 July 1484: 14 de febrero de 1417–30 de julio de 1484
es.Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England: Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Iselham, Cambridgeshire, England: Isleham Baptist, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Peyton nació el 14 de febrero de 1417, en Dry Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Peyton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Grace Burgoyne, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Francis aproximadamente 1441, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1443, a la edad de 26 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of cambridgeshire & huntingdon. Murió el 30 de julio de 1484, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
